data.scene: When the Home Assistant server sends a push notification via FCM.
data.purpose: Display push notifications and alerts from Home Assistant.
data.source: Firebase Cloud Messaging (pushed from Home Assistant server)
data.item: Notification message content, title, image/video URLs, action button configuration
data.frequency: Triggered by the Home Assistant server
data.thirdparty: FCM used for push delivery; content originates from the user's Home Assistant server

permissions.name: POST_NOTIFICATIONS
permissions.scene: When first receiving a push notification on Android 13+
permissions.purpose: Display push notifications to the user
permissions.impact: If denied, push notifications cannot be received or displayed

permissions.name: BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE
permissions.authorization: Pre-authorization (user must manually grant in system settings)
permissions.purpose: Read notification content from other apps on the device
permissions.impact: If denied, the notification listener sensor will not work

data.scene: When any app on the device posts a notification (notification listener sensor enabled).
data.purpose: Sync other apps' notification content to Home Assistant for automation rules.
data.item: Other apps' notification titles, text content, sender package name
data.frequency: Triggered immediately each time another app posts a notification
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; data is sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Notification Sensor -> Enable/Disable

permissions.name: POST_NOTIFICATIONS
permissions.scene: When first receiving a push notification on Android 13+
permissions.purpose: Display push notifications to the user
permissions.impact: If denied, push notifications cannot be received or displayed

permissions.name: BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE
permissions.authorization: Pre-authorization (user must manually grant in system settings)
permissions.purpose: Read notification content from other apps on the device
permissions.impact: If denied, the notification listener sensor will not work
